Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement.

Ema Bell's unopposed motion to approved Prop 65 settlement and consent judgment is Granted. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a separate proposed order and judgment. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
